base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dungeon_sea_shrine — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Sea Shrine — Kraken/Water Fiend lair. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sea Shrine — Kraken/Water Fiend lair; underwater exploration
